name: vMod
short: Full-featured moderation cog with cases, modlog, and setup panel.
description: vMod is a comprehensive moderation cog that provides kick, ban, tempban, softban, massban, slowmode, rename, userinfo, and name history commands. It writes moderation cases to Red's modlog framework, supports a button/dropdown setup panel, and integrates with vError for consistent error reporting across the moderation system.
install_msg: vMod installed! Run `[p]vmod setup` in your desired log channel to configure the modlog. Use `[p]help vMod` to see all available moderation commands.
author: VantageOverlook
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild moderation configuration settings. Moderation case data is written to Red's built-in modlog storage. No additional personal data is stored beyond what Red's modlog captures.
